claim_boundary: no tower advantage or disadvantage claim

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: Training candidates are traceable to repo-resident parent diagnostics.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: Training candidate provenance is not established.
goal_criteria.partial_signal: candidate manifest exists but lacks parent source detail
goal_criteria.question: Were training candidates selected from the parent readout source?
goal_criteria.success_signal: candidate_manifest includes selected parent candidates and source files

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: The run is a real tower-only training health diagnostic.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: The run is only an executability probe, not full training.
goal_criteria.failure_signal: learner update evidence is missing or episode-local only
goal_criteria.partial_signal: runtime traces exist but learner update evidence is sparse
goal_criteria.question: Did each replicate preserve learner state across episodes?
goal_criteria.success_signal: persistent_learner_across_episodes is true and learner updates are recorded

goal_criteria.claim_if_met: Selected towers support tower-only training under the locked budget.
goal_criteria.claim_if_not_met: Some selected towers do not train cleanly under the locked budget.
goal_criteria.failure_signal: zero concrete steps or lift failures dominate
goal_criteria.question: Did selected towers produce concrete steps and successful lifts?

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: blocks training-health interpretation for that candidate
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: Parent evidence no longer supports using this candidate.

structural_limit_checks.claim_effect: marks candidate untrainable under this budget
structural_limit_checks.interpretation_if_triggered: The tower runtime did not emit base transitions.
The run executed but did not provide learner-update evidence.
The controller selected a tier with no live actions.
